overview: A health clinic providing comprehensive primary care, mental health services, and social support specifically designed to address health disparities for men of color. BMHC facilitates care coordination and assists with insurance access.
highlights: Care management across providers at no additional cost
Mental & Behavioral Health services including counseling and psychiatric assessments
Social determinant support including transportation coordination and food access
targetAudience: Men of color seeking comprehensive primary care and mental health services with culturally competent care coordination.
